SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server

Class RMIServer

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
RMIServerStub, Serializable, Remote
public class RMIServer extends UnicastRemoteObject implements RMIServerStub
This class is the server that manages the RMI connections with the clients. It implements the RMIServerStub interface.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • RMIServer

      public RMIServer(MultipleMatchesHandler multipleMatchesHandler) throws RemoteException
      This constructor initializes the RMIServer.
      Parameters:
      multipleMatchesHandler - This object is used to manage the multiple matches that are played at the same time.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

  • Method Details

    • join

      public void join(int id, RMIClientSkeleton client) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to start the server. It starts the pinging thread that checks if the clients are still connected to the server. It also starts the RMI registry.
      Parameters:
      id - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      client - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is connected to the server.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • leave

      public void leave(int id, RMIClientSkeleton client) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to stop the server. It stops the pinging thread that checks if the clients are still connected to the server. It also stops the RMI registry.
      Parameters:
      id - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      client - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is connected to the server.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • createGame

      public void createGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, String name, int numOfPlayers) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to create a new game. It creates a new game controller and adds it to the multipleMatchesHandler. It also adds the client to the multipleMatchesHandler. It sets the virtual view of the player and updates the lobby view. It also sends a message to the other players that a new player has joined the game. If the number of players is invalid, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      createGame in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      client - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is connected to the server.
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      name - This is the name of the player that is creating the game.
      numOfPlayers - This is the number of players that will play the game.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • availableLobbies

      public void availableLobbies(RMIClientSkeleton client) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to get the available lobbies. It sends the available lobbies to the client. If there are no available lobbies, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      availableLobbies in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      client - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is connected to the server.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • joinGame

      public void joinGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, int controllerHash, String name) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to join a game. It adds the player to the game controller and sets the virtual view of the player. It also sends a message to the other players that a new player has joined the game. If the lobby is not active, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      joinGame in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      client - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is connected to the server.
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      controllerHash - This is the hash of the game controller that the player wants to join.
      name - This is the name of the player that is joining the game.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • placeCard

      public void placeCard(int clientId, String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to place a card. It places the card in the player's kingdom. It also sends a message to the other players that a player has placed a card. If the card is not placed, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      placeCard in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      player - This is the name of the player that is placing the card.
      cardId - This is the id of the card that is being placed.
      side - This is the side of the card that is being placed.
      pos - This is the position of the card that is being placed.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • chooseToken

      public void chooseToken(int clientId, String player, Token token) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make the player choose a token. It also updates the other players that a player has chosen a token. If the token is not chosen, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      chooseToken in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      player - This is the name of the player that is choosing the token.
      token - This is the token that is being chosen.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • chooseObjective

      public void chooseObjective(int clientId, String player, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make the player choose an objective. It also updates the other players that a player has chosen an objective. If the objective is not chosen, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection.
      Specified by:
      chooseObjective in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      player - This is the name of the player that is choosing the objective.
      cardId - This is the id of the objective that is being chosen.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • drawCardFromDeck

      public void drawCardFromDeck(int clientId, String player, String deck) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck. If the player is not logged, it sends an error message to the client. It also updates the other players that a player has drawn a card from the deck. If the card is not drawn, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection. if in the endgame, it sends the results to the players. if it is the last turn, it sends a message to the players that it is the last turn. notifies the turn to the players.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromDeck in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      player - This is the name of the player that is drawing the card.
      deck - This is the deck from which the card is being drawn.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • drawCardFromAvailable

      public void drawCardFromAvailable(int clientId, String player, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards. If the player is not logged, it sends an error message to the client. It also updates the other players that a player has drawn a card from the available cards. If the card is not drawn, it sends an error message to the client. It also sends an error message to the client if there is a problem with the connection. if in the endgame, it sends the results to the players. if it is the last turn, it sends a message to the players that it is the last turn. notifies the turn to the players.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromAvailable in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      player - This is the name of the player that is drawing the card.
      cardId - This is the id of the card that is being drawn.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • ping

      public void ping(int clientId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to send a message to the player to make sure that the connection is still active. If the player is disconnected, it sends a message to the other players that the player is disconnected.
      Specified by:
      ping in interface RMIServerStub
      Parameters:
      clientId - This is the id of the client that is connected to the server.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - This exception is thrown when there is a problem with the connection.

    • playerDisconnected

      public void playerDisconnected(RMIClientSkeleton cs)
      This method is used to disconnect the player from the server. It removes the player from the clients map. It also sends a message to the other players that the player is disconnected.
      Parameters:
      cs - This is the RMIClientSkeleton of the client that is disconnected from the server.

    • startPingingClient

      public void startPingingClient()
      This method is used to start the pinging thread that checks if the clients are still connected to the server. It sends a ping to the clients every 5 seconds.

    • getMultipleMatchesHandler

      public MultipleMatchesHandler getMultipleMatchesHandler()
      This method is used to get the multipleMatchesHandler.
      Returns:
      The multipleMatchesHandler.
